findings.title: B8 is still missing the required in-daemon live-reconcile restore path
findings.detail: The approved T4 contract requires snapshot/restore to pass clean-daemon restore, in-daemon live reconcile, stopped/restarted reason, and stale-security-generation behavior before B8 can be called complete. The live implementation exposes only one production restore entry point, and it hard-codes FreshDaemon: true, which structurally forbids the live classification branch. There is no alternate runtime path that restores with FreshDaemon: false or supplies SamePTYIdentityOwned evidence, and the shipped tests/E2E only prove the fresh-daemon never-live case. The receipt nevertheless marks B8 and the overall lane done while explicitly admitting that in-daemon live reconcile is not implemented. That is a direct acceptance-contract miss.

blocking_findings.title: B8 is still missing the required in-daemon live-reconcile restore path
blocking_findings.detail: The only production restore path always runs as a fresh-daemon restore and therefore can never satisfy the approved in-daemon live-reconcile acceptance behavior that T4 marked complete.
